alt_forms.note: ⚠️ WH-specific: 接敵状態 is a WH-specific status term. Do not use as a substitute; 交戦中 is the safe alternative.

definitions.gloss_en: a status indicating that a unit is currently engaged in close combat with an enemy unit
definitions.gloss_jp: {ユニット|ゆにっと}が{敵|てき}{ユニット|ゆにっと}と{近|きん}{接|せつ}{戦|せん}{闘|とう}を{行|おこな}っている{状|じょう}{態|たい}
definitions.explanation_en: A game state that restricts a unit's available actions (typically preventing non-combat movement) until the engagement is resolved.
definitions.implicit_notes: 中 functions as a continuous-state suffix (〜している状態). 交戦中 is a standard Japanese diplomatic and military term meaning 'at war / engaged in combat'. Kotobank cites it in diplomatic/military context, independent of any game system.
definitions.orthography_notes: 交戦 (kousen): 交 (mutual/interact) + 戦 (battle). 中 (chuu) as a suffix: in the state of. A completely standard compound. JWC glossary attests combat engagement terms independently.
definitions.game_setting_notes: In miniature wargames, 交戦中 is a game state (being in base contact or engagement range with an enemy). Distinguished from the WH-specific 接敵状態, which should be avoided.

usage_jp: {交|こう}{戦|せん}{中|ちゅう}の{ユニット|ゆにっと}は{移|い}{動|どう}できない (engaged units cannot move)
comparative_notes: 接敵状態 (setteki joutai) is the WH Japan game status term and must be avoided. 交戦中 is a classical Japanese term safe for all uses.

examples.japanese: {交|こう}{戦|せん}{中|ちゅう}のユニットは{突|とつ}{撃|げき}{段|だん}{階|かい}に{移|い}{動|どう}できない。
examples.english: Engaged units cannot move during the charging phase.

cross_references.note: 白兵戦段階 — the phase in which engaged units fight
攻撃 — the action performed while 交戦中
